chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.placeholder: Describe what you want to build or fix...
chat.templateBanner: A template was just loaded — your previous project files were replaced.
chat.createScratch: Create from scratch instead of using this template (20-30 min)
chat.createScratchRecommended: Usually gives better results than templates
chat.fixerHint: This can take up to 10 minutes — feel free to leave the page open, but do not close this page.
chat.rawFilesEmpty: No files yet in this session.

feedback.titleFix: Thanks for using the AI assistant!
feedback.thankYou: Your feedback is incredibly valuable and directly helps us improve the product for everyone. We really appreciate you taking a moment to share your experience!
feedback.notesLabel: Anything broken or could be better?
feedback.notesPlaceholder: What worked? What's off? What would you change?
feedback.restoreNote: Don't want to keep this build? You can restore your project to how it was before.
feedback.restoreButton: Restore project to before this build
feedback.dismissTooltip: Dismiss this feedback form. It won't come back for this change.

signup.createGame: To build a game from scratch instead of using this template, I need you to sign up first.
signup.fixGame: To run a fix on your game, I need you to sign up first.
signup.budget: You've used up your free anonymous budget — sign up to keep going.
signup.default: I need you to sign up first.

toolbar.shareLink: Share this link to invite players:
toolbar.previewClientTooltip: Open another window of this project to test multiplayer locally
toolbar.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

settings.cloudSynced: This project syncs to parallaxpro.ai on every save.
settings.cloudHint: Sync this project to parallaxpro.ai so you can pick up where you left off from any computer.
settings.cloudSignedOutHint: Sign in to parallaxpro.ai to enable cloud sync for this project.
settings.cloudSignedOutCloudHint: This is a cloud project but you're signed out — saves aren't reaching parallaxpro.ai. Sign in to resume syncing.
settings.cloudSyncedCheck: ✓ This project syncs to parallaxpro.ai on every save.
settings.chatAgentHint: Recommended: LLM API — faster (<1s vs 10-20s per message, because the CLI is relaunched on every turn), cheaper, and produces cleaner output. CLI agents are a convenience when you don't have an API key, but they run in agent mode rather than chat mode and may perform very poorly — occasionally emitting tool calls instead of chat replies.
settings.editingAgentHint: Agent spawned when the AI decides to edit your project files.
settings.qualityHighHint: Shadows, MSAA anti-aliasing, HBAO, screen-space reflections, bloom

editor.connectionLost: Connection lost — editing disabled until reconnection
editor.reconnectFailed: Unable to reconnect. Please check your connection and refresh the page.
editor.disconnectRefresh: Connection lost. Please refresh the page to continue editing.

projectList.emptyDefault: No projects yet. Create your first game!
projectList.emptyCloud: No cloud projects yet. Publishing or promoting a project will put it here.
projectList.cloudSignIn: Sign in to parallaxpro.ai to access your cloud projects.
projectList.stopTooltip: Stop this build (the run is killed and the project unlocks)
projectList.anonBanner: You're browsing anonymously — your projects live only in this browser. Sign up (free) to save them across devices and unlock more features.
projectList.restartNotice: We may restart the servers at any time as we iterate and flush out issues — apologies for the bumps! Your projects are always saved, but a long-running AI build could be killed mid-way and you'll need to retry it.
projectList.generateHint: Describe your game idea and AI will build it for you.
projectList.generatePlaceholder: e.g. A 3D platformer with double-jump and coin collection...
projectList.templateHint: Start with a ready-made game template you can customize.
projectList.loginTooltip: Sign in to parallaxpro.ai so you can publish this project
projectList.stopBuildConfirmMsg: The run will be stopped and all progress from this attempt is discarded. The project will unlock — you can start again with a different prompt.

feedbackModal.title: Send Feedback
feedbackModal.placeholder: Describe the issue, suggestion, or feedback...

properties.title: Properties
properties.viewFSMsTooltip: Switch to FSM tab and show this entity's state machines

publish.title: Publish Game
publish.slugInvalid: Slug must be 3-64 chars, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens.
publish.revertConfirm: Revert project to v{version}? Your current editor state will be replaced.
publish.unpublishConfirm: Unpublish this game? It will no longer be accessible to players.

profiler.title: Performance
profiler.smoothnessHint: Lower and flatter is better. The red line marks a smooth 60 fps.
profiler.frameBudgetHint: Grouped view of what the engine is spending time on each frame.
profiler.cpuPhasesHint: Each phase timed separately — bar shows share of total tick time.
profiler.renderPassesHint: Approximate per-pass cost — CPU time spent assembling and submitting commands. Not true GPU time.
profiler.scriptCostHint: Sum of onUpdate / onFixedUpdate / onLateUpdate time across all entities sharing the same script.
profiler.noScriptsActive: No scripts active (press Play to see timings).

notice.searchFirstBody: Browse existing 3D models in the Community library below before generating — it's instant and saves GPU time.
notice.publicBold: We may make your generations public.
notice.publicBody: Once reviewed and recommended, your prompt and the resulting model are visible to other users. Don't include personal info or copyrighted work.

text.label: Describe a 3D model:
text.tooShort: Prompt must be at least {min} characters.

image.label: Upload an image of the subject:
image.dropPrimary: Click to choose or drag an image
image.dropHint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP — up to 8MB

preview.labelText: Preview — confirm to generate the 3D model from this image:

submit.cacheHit: ✓ Found a matching shared model — added to library.

library.notAvailable: 3D model generation isn't available on this backend.

soundFx.usageTooltip: Daily upload count. Resets at midnight UTC.

notice.privateBody: Only you can use these clips in chat or in your games — but the audio files themselves are not auth-gated.
notice.extract: Anyone with the URL (a friend you shared it with, anyone who gets the link, or anyone who plays a game you publish that uses the clip) can download and reuse the audio.
notice.tokenHint: URLs use long random tokens so they're hard to guess, but treat anything you upload here as effectively public — don't upload audio you wouldn't want extracted.

upload.dropPrimary: Drop audio file or click to browse
upload.dropHint: ≤10s · wav, mp3, ogg, flac · max 2 MB
upload.parseFailed: Could not parse audio file. Try a different format.

record.hint: Recording auto-stops at 10s. Click again to stop early.

library.empty: Upload or record to add your first clip.
library.addToChatTooltip: Add this clip as a hint for the AI Assistant
